Title: OpenClaw: Forged Nostr DMs could create pairing state before signature verification
Description: Before OpenClaw 2026.3.31, the Nostr DM ingress path could issue pairing challenges before validating the event signature. A forged DM could create a pending pairing entry and trigger a pairing-reply attempt before signature rejection.
NotImpacted: All versions before 2026.3.22, all versions starting from 2026.3.31
